<!-- dropbox: https://www.dropbox.com/preview/CbDD_Dienstordner/literatur/altes%20corpus/chunked/chunked/Band07_chunk001.pdf#page=14 -->
<!-- citation-page-top: Band07 p26 -->

ALTENERDING


[[File:Band07_chunk001_p014_img001.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band07_chunk001_p014_img002.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band07_chunk001_p014_img003.jpg|thumb|A<sub>6</sub> Samson und Dalila]]



[[File:Band07_chunk001_p014_img004.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band07_chunk001_p014_img005.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band07_chunk001_p014_img006.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band07_chunk001_p014_img007.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band07_chunk001_p014_img008.jpg|thumb|A<sub>8</sub> Königin von Saba vor Salomo A<sub>1–8</sub> Antetypische Vorbilder Mariens]]



----
4/
<!-- citation-page-bottom: Band07 p27 -->
